headline: Stable negative sentiment (score: -37.9)
key_insights: Optimism trending up 48% over 7 days (strong momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations dominate with 136 quotes and 88 at strong intensity - people are expressing anger and annoyance very forcefully today.

• The frustration score of 42.6 sits in the lower-middle range of what we've seen over 149 days, so while dominant, it's not exceptionally high.

• Optimism dropped significantly from yesterday (-3.6 to -24.4), suggesting moods have soured considerably.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
